mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, interest_tags, avg_viewing_time, total_watch_count, like_rate, active_level) VALUES (#{userId}, #{interestTags}, #{avgViewingTime}, #{totalWatchCount}, #{likeRate}, #{activeLevel}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE interest_tags = VALUES(interest_tags), avg_viewing_time = VALUES(avg_viewing_time), total_watch_count = VALUES(total_watch_count), like_rate = VALUES(like_rate), active_level = VALUES(active_level)
